pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh which map ROCKETS_DIR to /home/ga/Documents/rockets and create this file.
Confirmed via export_result.sh, setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh which specify and clear this path, as well as verifier.py which evaluates this path.
Confirmed via verifier.py which checks that the simulation wind speed matches this value with a 0.5 tolerance.
Confirmed via verifier.py which explicitly requires the parachute deploy event to be ALTITUDE and the altitude to be 50.0m within a 5.0 tolerance.
Confirmed via verifier.py which computes score and asserts 'score >= 70'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying the OpenRocket built-in example design 'simple_model_rocket.ork', a synthetic educational design file originally authored by Sampo Niskanen. The target modification involves updating the simulation wind speed to 12.0 m/s and configuring the parachute deploy event to trigger at an altitude of 50m. Both parameters were confirmed against verifier scripts and setup scripts which manage the file path and export targets.
